story.label: The Legend of the Conqueror
story.heading: Conqueror of Empires. Master of Time.
story.p1: He conquered the ancient world, but his greatest ambition lay far beyond the boundaries of his era. Alexander, the Reptilian King, did not just seek land—he sought eternity.
story.p2: During the siege of a forgotten mystic temple, he discovered a rift in the fabric of the universe—a portal through time itself. Stepping into the modern era, he found not armies, but the ultimate symbol of enduring power and precision: The Rolex.
story.p3: This NFT is the physical proof of that impossible legend. A breathtaking fusion of ancient conquest and modern luxury, minted eternally on the blockchain. A timepiece worthy of an immortal emperor.

how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.subtitle: Three steps to owning a piece of history

steps.title: Connect Wallet
steps.desc: Link your MetaMask or WalletConnect-compatible wallet in one click. Your gateway to authenticated digital luxury.

steps.title: Choose Your Crown
steps.desc: Browse the curated collection of verified Rolex timepieces. Each piece is a unique 1-of-1 NFT with full provenance.

steps.title: Mint & Own Forever
steps.desc: Mint your chosen timepiece to the blockchain. Immutable ownership, verified authenticity — yours for eternity.

roadmap.title: Roadmap
roadmap.subtitle: The journey of the Crown Collection

phases.title: Genesis Drop
phases.desc: Launch of 88 unique Crown NFTs. Each tied to a real Rolex reference. Whitelist access for early collectors.

phases.title: Secondary Market
phases.desc: OpenSea and Blur marketplace integration. Royalty system for original minters. Price discovery begins.

phases.title: Metaverse Integration
phases.desc: Wear your Crown NFT in Decentraland, The Sandbox, and other metaverse platforms. Flex your digital Rolex.

phases.title: Crown DAO
phases.desc: NFT holders become members of the Crown DAO. Vote on future collections, partnerships, and exclusive events.

questions.a: A Rolex NFT is a unique digital token on the Ethereum blockchain that represents an exclusive digital artwork of a Rolex timepiece. Each NFT is one-of-a-kind and comes with proof of ownership and authenticity.

questions.q: How do I mint a Crown NFT?
questions.a: Connect your MetaMask or WalletConnect-compatible wallet, browse the collection, select your desired timepiece, and click Mint. The transaction will be processed on the Ethereum network.
The Crown Collection is built on the Ethereum blockchain using the ERC-721 standard, ensuring maximum security, interoperability, and decentralization.

questions.q: Is this affiliated with Rolex SA?
questions.a: This is a conceptual university project exploring the intersection of luxury brands and Web3 technology. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to Rolex SA in any way.
Yes! Once minted, your Crown NFT is yours to keep, display, or trade on any compatible NFT marketplace including OpenSea, Blur, and LooksRare.
You'll need an Ethereum-compatible wallet such as MetaMask, WalletConnect, Coinbase Wallet, or Rainbow. Make sure you have enough ETH to cover the mint price plus gas fees.

footer.disclaimer: A conceptual university project. Not affiliated with Rolex SA.

nft_intro.title: THE FUTURE OF OWNERSHIP
nft_intro.subtitle: Luxury watches are no longer just physical objects. With NFT technology, time itself becomes digitally immortal.
nft_intro.p1: "Imagine owning a one-of-a-kind luxury watch whose authenticity, ownership history, rarity, and digital identity are permanently secured on the blockchain."

values.title: Digital Scarcity
values.desc: Unlike standard digital files, NFTs are strictly limited. Code guarantees maximum supply, ensuring rarity.

values.title: Ownership Verification
values.desc: Instantly cryptographically prove that you are the sole owner of the asset anywhere in the world.

values.title: Community Access
values.desc: Holding the NFT grants access to exclusive private clubs, events, and future airdrops.

values.title: Digital Identity
values.desc: Your wallet is your new showcase. NFTs represent your status and taste in the decentralized web.

nft_watch_integration.subtitle: THE PHYSICAL MEETS DIGITAL
nft_watch_integration.title: A New Dimension of Luxury
nft_watch_integration.text: Every masterpiece is cryptographically paired with a 1-of-1 NFT, locking its legacy into the blockchain forever.

nft_blockchain.before_text: Digital assets could be copied infinitely. True ownership of a digital item was impossible to verify, rendering them virtually worthless.

nft_empire.title: THE DIGITAL EMPIRE OF THE FUTURE
nft_empire.text: Beyond art. Beyond luxury. The blockchain is rebuilding the foundational architecture of society. NFTs will soon power the core of human identity and interaction.
